title: Savory Chicken Crumble Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole made with shredded chicken, topped with a crunchy crumble mixture, perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter over medium heat. Add the boneless, skinless chicken breast and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes. Shred the chicken with two forks and set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix together the savory mixture, panko breadcrumbs, and shredded cheddar cheese (if using).
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange 1/2 of the shredded chicken in the bottom of the dish. Top with 1/2 of the savory mixture mixture.
Repeat the layers, starting with the remaining shredded chicken and topping with the remaining savory mixture.
Dot the top of the casserole with the remaining 4 tablespoons of unsalted butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
